judge_reason: Description A reports two FBI stamps both dated '47 (1947) with text 'DEPT. OF JUSTICE' and 'RECEIVED-LABDL', while Description B reports different stamp text ('OFFICE OF JUSTICE', 'RECEIVED-MAIL ROOM', 'RECEIVED-LADD') and adds a red stamp with 'JULY 1946', indicating contradictory verbatim readings of the same visual elements.
original_image_tags: The back of a light blue document. At the top, there are two punch holes with a piece of yellow tape covering the left one. Near the center, "by J" is handwritten in pencil. At the bottom, two FBI stamps are visible, both upside down. On the left: "JUL 25 10 54 AM '47", "RECEIVED-LABDL", "FBI", "A DEPT. OF JUSTICE". On the right: "JUL 23 5 02 PM '47", "RECEIVED-MAIL ROO", "FBI", "DEPT. OF JUSTICE". A faint rectangular red stamp is also visible above the right FBI stamp.
gpt_mini_desc: *Image: Scanned tan paper document page with three hole punches along the top edge, torn corners, faint reversed typewritten text, and two blue circular date stamps near the lower half.*
